scripts.dev:local: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:up && pnpm db:deploy && pnpm db:seed && pnpm dev
scripts.db:format: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm --dir packages/database exec prisma format --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:generate: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm --dir packages/database exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:validate: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm --dir packages/database exec prisma validate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm --dir packages/database exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:deploy: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm --dir packages/database exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reset: dotenv -e .env.local -- pnpm --dir packages/database exec prisma migrate reset --schema prisma/schema.prisma --force
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
